# Significant Hobbies — full agent brief

Life planner for private daily rituals and public living — hobbies, bucket lists, and side quests over time.

## Index

# Significant Hobbies

Life planner: private daily rituals + public living (hobbies, bucket lists, side quests).

## What it is

- Hobby timelines and public exploration
- Private rituals and progress tracking
- Editorial content for agents at `/llms-full.txt`

## Agent entrypoints

- https://significanthobbies.com/llms.txt
- https://significanthobbies.com/llms-full.txt
- https://significanthobbies.com/api/ai
- https://significanthobbies.com/index.md

Auth-walled personal data is not agent-indexed.

## Product links

- Home: https://significanthobbies.com/ — Product landing
- Explore: https://significanthobbies.com/explore — Public hobby timelines

## Machine surfaces

- https://significanthobbies.com/llms.txt
- https://significanthobbies.com/llms-full.txt
- https://significanthobbies.com/api/ai
- https://significanthobbies.com/index.md
- https://significanthobbies.com/sitemap.xml
- https://significanthobbies.com/robots.txt
